products.name: Littmann Stethoscope Cases
products.description: Protective hard case designed for Littmann stethoscopes with durable zip closure and compact portable design.

products.name: Adult Knee Hammer
products.description: Reflex percussion hammer used for neurological examination and assessment of deep tendon reflexes in adults.

products.name: Paediatric Knee Hammer
products.description: Lightweight reflex percussion hammer designed for neurological examination and deep tendon reflex testing in paediatric patients.

products.name: Littmann Spare Parts Kit
products.description: Genuine Littmann spare parts kit for Classic III and Cardiology IV stethoscopes including soft-sealing eartips, tunable diaphragms, and non-chill bell sleeve.

products.name: Cardiology Stethoscope Case
products.description: Premium protective hard case designed for cardiology stethoscopes with durable zip closure and portable carrying handle.

products.name: Paediatric Kit
products.description: Complete paediatric activity and examination support kit including colouring books, crayons, toys, wooden utensils, stationery items, and transparent carry bag for child-friendly clinical interactions.

products.name: Sensory Kit
products.description: Portable sensory examination kit containing visual acuity charts, colour vision cards, cotton wool, neurotips, tuning tools, measuring tape, and sensory testing accessories for neurological assessment.

products.name: Littmann Quality A Kit
products.description: Quality replacement kit for Littmann stethoscopes including diaphragms, rim, and soft-sealing eartips for optimal acoustic performance and maintenance.

products.name: Littmann Quality A Adult Diaphragm
products.description: Quality replacement adult diaphragm for Littmann stethoscopes designed to maintain clear acoustic performance and accurate auscultation.

products.name: Littmann Quality A Ear Tips
products.description: Soft-sealing replacement ear tips for Littmann stethoscopes designed for comfortable fit, noise isolation, and improved acoustic performance.

products.name: Littmann Quality A Paediatric Diaphragm
products.description: Quality replacement paediatric diaphragm for Littmann stethoscopes designed to provide clear acoustic performance during paediatric auscultation.

products.name: Littmann Quality A Chill Bell Sleeve
products.description: Replacement non-chill bell sleeve for Littmann stethoscopes designed to improve patient comfort during auscultation.

products.name: LED Medical Torch (Charging Display)
products.description: Rechargeable LED medical examination torch designed for pupil assessment and ENT examinations with dual white and warm light modes, stainless steel body, and built-in pupil gauge.
